title: A Charm Invests A Face
content:
A charm invests a face
    Imperfectly beheld, --
    The lady dare not lift her veil
    For fear it be dispelled.

    But peers beyond her mesh,
    And wishes, and denies, --
    Lest interview annul a want
    That image satisfies.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Charm Invests A Face"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
